records.pMessage: Select the number of drinks to buy.
An SP Drink will raise your SP by 3. Use one now?

SP Drink bought.
Do you want to use it now?

An SP Drink restores 3 SP when you drink one!
The upper limit for SP is 3, so you can’t gain
more than that. But don’t worry—if you’re in
danger of wasting SP, you won't be able to
use the drink. You can’t use Bravely Second
if your SP is negative, so restore it when you
can!

Support number
%ls

The first one is available at a special price!

Take advantage of this offer to see for yourself
what an SP Drink can do.
Select how many you want to use.

There is nothing you can buy right now.
Please see the official website for details.

A network error has occurred.
Please try again later.

Internet communication can
take some time to complete.
Do you want to proceed?

You cannot use an SP Drink now, as it will put you
over the max SP limit.

* The max SP limit is 3.

An item which adds 3 SP when
consumed.
